title: iwlwifi: WARNING when setting Tx power with WEXT while in RFKILL - MWG100249491
description:
Created attachment 182661 [details]
lspci -vvvx

I am testing vanilla linux-4.1.2 kernel on Dell Vostro 3550 laptop with A12 BIOS. During cold boot I received:

[   20.114785] r8169 0000:05:00.0: Direct firmware load for rtl_nic/rtl8168e-2.fw failed with error -2

patch:
From ac99d0dac74970d97dbfc0a6d640162179b20795 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Emmanuel Grumbach <emmanuel.grumbach@intel.com>
Date: Mon, 2 Nov 2015 14:01:35 +0200
Subject: [PATCH] mac80211: ensure we don't update tx power on a non-running
 sdata

We can't update the Tx power on the device unless it is
running.

type=bugfix
bug=cq:MWG100249491
fixes=unknown

Change-Id: I42a1a4785053f5d70b5174bb80aef3ac9e5231fb
Signed-off-by: Emmanuel Grumbach <emmanuel.grumbach@intel.com>
---
I think it fixes:
commit db82d8a966ded064bd4cf0e1fcca13442f50d0ae
Author: Lorenzo Bianconi <lorenzo.bianconi83@gmail.com>
Date:   Wed Jan 14 12:55:08 2015 +0100
    mac80211: enable TPC through mac80211 stack
But I am not sure
---
 net/mac80211/iface.c | 3 ++-
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/net/mac80211/iface.c b/net/mac80211/iface.c
index c864fd5..dc469f3 100644
--- a/net/mac80211/iface.c
+++ b/net/mac80211/iface.c
@@ -77,7 +77,8 @@ bool __ieee80211_recalc_txpower(struct ieee80211_sub_if_data *sdata)
 void ieee80211_recalc_txpower(struct ieee80211_sub_if_data *sdata,
 			      bool update_bss)
 {
-	if (__ieee80211_recalc_txpower(sdata) || update_bss)
+	if (__ieee80211_recalc_txpower(sdata) ||
+	    (update_bss && ieee80211_sdata_running(sdata)))
 		ieee80211_bss_info_change_notify(sdata, BSS_CHANGED_TXPOWER);
 }
 
-- 
2.5.0
Assignee: DO NOT USE - assign "network-wireless-intel" component instead
